title: Sunfish MDM Pre-Seeded Node Configuration
description: v1 schema for the node-config.json file a managed-device MDM operator pre-seeds before the Sunfish local-node host first runs. See docs/specifications/mdm-config-schema.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version tag. v1 hosts reject any other value.

teamId.description: Stable team identifier; UUID recommended. Immutable after first sync.

relayEndpoint.description: HTTPS URL of the team's Bridge relay. Absent means peer-to-peer only.

allowedBuckets.description: Whitelist of subscription buckets the host will sync. Client-side filter; not a security boundary.

dataDirectory.description: Override for LocalNodeOptions.DataDirectory. MUST resolve to a path under the platform MDM-wipe-target tree.

updateServerUrl.description: HTTPS base URL of the internal update server. Absent disables auto-update.

enterpriseAttestationIssuerPublicKey.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte Ed25519 public key of the org's role attestation issuer.
